statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.

hints.text: Check if the greedy approach is being used to maximize the number of coins used.

editorial.title: Coin Change Mixture with Incorrect Implementation
editorial.intuition: To solve this, use greedy algorithm that sorts the array and then selects the maximum value coin first.
editorial.bruteForce: Brute force approach summary: Brute Force approach is a naive solution which tries all possible combinations of coins.
editorial.betterSolution: Implementing Greedy Algorithm: Sort the Array of Coins in Descending Order.
editorial.optimalSolution: Optimal solution details: Select the maximum value coin first as much as possible.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The greedy strategy works because we always take the largest denomination coin that is not exceeding the amount we need to find the change for.
editorial.dryRun: Select the maximum value coin 5 first then the coin 2.
commonMistakes: Using brute force to find the minimum number of coins.

functionSignature.python: List[int] coin_change(self, coins: List[int], n: int) -> List[int]
